name: Sirf Tum
overview: A kind-hearted girl, Suhani dreams to be a doctor, Ranveer a strong-minded man, just has one obsession, Suhani. Destiny brings them together, but a dark secret looms over them. Will it keep them united or will it break their bond forever?

trailers.title: Sirf Tum | सिर्फ तुम | When Fire And Water Meet... | Promo
